title: Stainless Steel 18" Cooling Tray
features: This 18-inch Large Cooling Rack from the Baker & Salt range is perfect for cooling you're cakes, biscuits and buns evenly.
The Baker & Salt range are well known for their high-quality bakeware at sensible prices and this rack is no exception.
4 stable feet ensure your baking is raised above the countertop, allowing even cooling around every piece.
A 18-inch chrome-plated narrow grid pattern ensures this rack is strong but light and can be placed directly in the dishwasher.
